meta.title: CaltransBizConnect - Connecting Businesses with Opportunities
meta.description: CaltransBizConnect connects Small Businesses with contracting opportunities and Prime Contractors with qualified partners. Your central hub for Caltrans business development.

fields.title: Build. Compete. Win.
fields.subtitle: Caltrans delivers statewide supportive services to help Small Businesses strengthen readiness for transportation contracting opportunities through structured training, technical assistance, and resource navigation.

smallBusinessCard.imageAlt: Construction professionals reviewing plans on site
smallBusinessCard.title: For Small Businesses
smallBusinessCard.description: Find contracting opportunities, upload your capability statement, and connect with Prime Contractors seeking your expertise.
smallBusinessCard.srText: Learn more about small business services

primeContractorCard.title: For Prime Contractors
primeContractorCard.description: Post structured opportunities, find qualified Small Businesses, and manage your contracting needs efficiently.
primeContractorCard.srText: Learn more about prime contractor services

tiles.title: Bid Readiness
tiles.description: Expert guidance through bid packages, requirement identification, and submission timeline planning to strengthen your competitive position.

tiles.title: Capacity Building
tiles.description: Strengthen your estimating, compliance, and project readiness capabilities through structured training and one-on-one technical assistance.

tiles.title: Partnership Connections
tiles.description: Connect with prime contractors and explore upcoming subcontracting opportunities across all Caltrans districts.

tiles.title: Resource Navigation
tiles.description: Access templates, checklists, and guidance materials designed to streamline your business operations and contracting processes.

columns.heading: New to the Platform?
columns.text: Learn how CaltransBizConnect works and what you need to get started.

columns.heading: Check Eligibility
columns.text: Review the eligibility criteria for Small Business certification.

columns.heading: Browse Opportunities
columns.text: Explore current contracting opportunities across all Caltrans districts.
